zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil Gould於1525年出生在英國諾福爾可諾斯 艾爾哈姆時，她的父親Ephraim Gould20歲，母親Margaret Moore22歲。她於1549年與Robert Fiske在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲 聖 詹姆斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1571年4月30日在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil Gould于1525年出生在英国諾福爾可諾斯 艾爾哈姆时，她的父亲Ephraim Gould20岁，母亲Margaret Moore22岁。她于1549年与Robert Fiske在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲 聖 詹姆斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1571年4月30日在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Gould
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gold
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Meyer, Mayer, Hyman, Ari, Avram, Mendel, Moshe, Shraga, Aviva.

Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Gold, Yiddish gold ‘gold’. In North America it is often a shortened form of one of the many compound artificial names of which Gold is the first element.

English and German: from Middle English go(u)ld, or Old English and Old High German gold ‘gold’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for someone who worked in gold, i.e. a refiner, jeweler, or gilder, or as a nickname for someone who either had many gold possessions or bright yellow hair.

variants.name: Guild
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Perthshire): apparently a nickname for someone who played a prominent part in a medieval guild. It may, however, be a Scottish variant of   Gould  .

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sibilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sibella

According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil Gould was born in 1525, in North Elmham, Norfolk, England, her father, Ephraim Gould, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Moore, was 22. She married Robert Fiske in 1549, in Bury St Edmunds St James, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 30 April 1571, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Robert Fiske en 1549, à Bury St Edmunds St James, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. ko.St. James, South Elmsham, Suffolk, Engla: 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 자메스
ko.St James's Church, South Elmham St James: 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 자메스 스트 자메스'스 c후르치

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil Gould(이)가 1525년 영국 노르폴크 노르스 엘함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ephraim Gould(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Moore(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1549년 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 자메스에서 Robert Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1571년 4월 30일 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil Gould nasceu em 1525, em North Elmham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ephraim Gould, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Moore, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Fiske em 1549, em Bury St Edmunds St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 30 de abril de 1571, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil Gould родилась в 1525 г. в местности норт элмхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Ephraim Gould было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Moore, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Fiske в 1549 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс ст джемесь, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 30 апреля 1571 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil Gould nació en 1525, en North Elmham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Ephraim Gould, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Moore, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Robert Fiske en 1549, en Bury St Edmunds St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de abril de 1571, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
